A TORNADO DEVELOPED ABOUT 3 MILES EAST-SOUTHEAST OF CECIL AT 745 PM AND TRAVELED EAST-NORTHEAST FOR ABOUT 4 MILES BEFORE DISSIPATING AT 749 PM ABOUT 3.5 MILES SOUTH OF OZARK. THIS TORNADO DAMAGED THE ROOF OF A HOME, DESTROYED SEVERAL OUTBUILDINGS, SNAPPED OR UPROOTED NUMEROUS TREES, AND BLEW DOWN POWER POLES. BASED ON THIS DAMAGE, IT WAS RATED EF-1 WITH MAXIMUM ESTIMATED WIND OF 95 TO 105 MPH.
